name: APImage
tagline: The AI image API for generation, editing, background removal, and product visuals in one.
description:
APImage is a unified AI image platform and API that bundles text-to-image generation, photo editing, background removal, and product visual creation. It's built for developers and designers who want multiple image capabilities without juggling separate tools and APIs. Credits are consumed per operation with tiered monthly plans.

APImage runs a formal affiliate program through Lemon Squeezy, offering 15% lifetime commission on every payment from referred customers  - one of the few newer AI image tools with an active affiliate scheme.
pros: Active affiliate program  - 15% lifetime recurring commission
Multiple image capabilities in one platform
Developer-friendly API available from free tier
cons: Free tier is only 10 one-time credits (not monthly)
Credit allowances per plan are modest for high-volume use
keyStrength: Multi-capability image API in one platform
